message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant "Application" as App #lavender
participant "«engine»\nAuto SDK Engine" as Engine #lightblue
participant "«avs»\nAlexa" as Alexa #lightgreen

note left of User : "Turn off AC"

User -> Alexa : 

Alexa -> Engine : PowerController.TurnOff directive

Engine -> App : Receive SetPowerControllerValue message
App -> App : Turn off AC
App -> Engine : Publish SetControllerValueMessage Reply

Engine -> Alexa : Alexa.Response event

note over Engine : SpeechSynthesizer.Speak directive\n«Alexa speech response»

Engine -> App : 

@enduml
